name: Gotion High-Tech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gotion High-Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and operation of lithium-ion batteries and materials in China and internationally. The company also offers power transmission and transformation equipment. Its principal products include LFP and NCM materials and batteries, battery packs, BMS, and energy storage battery packs. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hefei, China.
